name: Walk house, map old knob-and-tube runs
notes: Attic and basement. Photo every junction box before teardown.

name: Pull old wiring from attic
notes: Cut dead, label what stays. Bag the cloth-insulated stuff for the dumpster.

name: Set new 200A panel, mount and level
notes: Garage wall. Leave room for 40 circuits. Torque lugs to spec.

name: Run new meter base and mast
notes: Coordinate disconnect window with PECO. Weatherhead above roofline.

name: Drive ground rods, bond water main
notes: Two rods 6ft apart. Acorn clamp on the cold water line near the meter.

name: Pull kitchen small-appliance circuits
notes: Two 20A on the counter, dedicated 20A for fridge, 20A for microwave.

name: Rough-in kitchen boxes and recessed cans
notes: Six cans on a dimmer. Nail plates over every stud where romex crosses.

name: Wire dedicated range and dryer circuits
notes: 50A 6/3 for the range, 30A 10/3 for the dryer. Verify breaker sizing.

name: Rough-in upstairs bedrooms
notes: Three bedrooms. Receptacle every 12ft, switched lights, smoke detector home runs.

name: Bathroom GFCI and exhaust fan circuit
notes: GFCI receptacle, fan/light combo on its own switch leg.

name: Schedule L&I rough-in inspection
notes: Township office. Need everything open before drywall.

name: Rough-in inspection - walk with inspector
notes: Passed. One note: add nail plate at the stair stringer. Fixed same day.

name: Pull living and dining room circuits
notes: Switched receptacles for lamps, run for the future ceiling fan.

name: Basement circuits and sump pump dedicated
notes: Dedicated 20A for the sump, GFCI string for the workbench, two ceiling lights.

name: Label panel directory, fill out circuit map
notes: Type the directory, tape inside the door. Every circuit accounted for.

name: Trim out kitchen - devices and plates
notes: Tamper-resistant receptacles, set the cans, hang the under-cabinet lights.

name: Trim out bedrooms and hall
notes: Switches, receptacles, smoke and CO detectors interconnected.

name: Schedule final inspection
notes: Drywall done, fixtures in. Call township for final.

name: Final inspection and PECO reconnect
notes: Passed final. PECO set the meter, power back on the new service.

name: Walk the house with homeowner, final invoice
notes: Test every device with them. Hand over the panel directory. Send invoice to Steve.

name: Punch list - garage outlet not holding
notes: Homeowner says garage GFCI trips under load. Swap the device, check the splice.

name: Order parts for next rewire bid - Cedarbrook Supply
notes: Price 200A panel, romex by the roll, cans. Keep under what I quoted.
